name: medical clinics processing 50–100 appointments/week tool
description: For medical clinics processing 50–100 appointments/week, inefficient scheduling causes missed appointments. We optimize patient flow instead of manual scheduling via phone and paper calendars.
problem_solved: inefficient patient scheduling leading to missed appointments and overbooked slots
